title: Health, safety and wellbeing - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā kaupapa hauora, haumaru, toiora hoki

## Health, safety and wellbeing
Find out more about the health, safety and wellbeing measures and support in your child's school.
- Emergency preparedness 1
- Legal and compliance 1
- Te whakatumatuma: ngā āwhina me ngā taunakitanga mā tō tamaiti Bullying: help and support for your child Find out what bullying is and how to get help and support for your child.
Find out what bullying is and how to get help and support for your child.
- Ngā takunetanga ohotata Emergency events How parents and whānau | families can prepare and plan for emergency events at school.
How parents and whānau | families can prepare and plan for emergency events at school.
- Te tuku awhikiri ki te kura Immunisations at school Health New Zealand | Te Whatu Ora offers immunisations to Years 7 and 8 students in many schools and kura.
Health New Zealand | Te Whatu Ora offers immunisations to Years 7 and 8 students in many schools and kura.
- Ikura | Manaakitia te whare tangata Period products in schools Ikura | Manaakitia te whare tangata – period products are available free to young people in most schools and kura.
Ikura | Manaakitia te whare tangata – period products are available free to young people in most schools and kura.
- Te whakaita ā-ringa Physical restraint Physical restraint should only ever be used as a last resort. Understand schools' responsibilities and the rules that apply.
Physical restraint should only ever be used as a last resort. Understand schools' responsibilities and the rules that apply.
- Te tautoko i te ora me te hauora ā-hinengaro o tō tamaiti Support your child's wellbeing and mental health Find out how to support your child with positive mental health and wellbeing.
Find out how to support your child with positive mental health and wellbeing.
